Title: BE-101 Initialize Golang Backend
Description: Description: Create Golang backend project using Gin framework with clean architecture folder structure. Target: API server runs and GET /health returns 200 OK. Dependency: None.

Title: BE-102 Setup PostgreSQL Connection
Description: Description: Implement PostgreSQL connection using pgx or GORM with environment configuration and connection pooling. Target: backend successfully connects and logs 'database connected'. Dependency: BE-101.

Title: BE-103 Create Initial Database Schema
Description: Description: Create migration files for users, resumes, job_descriptions, and practice_sessions tables using golang-migrate. Target: tables created successfully in PostgreSQL. Dependency: BE-102.

Title: BE-104 Implement Auth Middleware
Description: Description: Implement JWT verification middleware for Clerk/Supabase authentication. Extract user ID and attach to request context. Target: protected endpoint GET /api/me returns authenticated user. Dependency: BE-101.

Title: BE-105 Setup Redis Cache
Description: Description: Configure Redis client for caching session data and AI responses. Target: ability to SET and GET cache values successfully. Dependency: BE-101.

Title: FE-101 Initialize Next.js Project
Description: Description: Create Next.js project with App Router, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, and shadcn/ui. Target: local development server runs using npm run dev. Dependency: None.

Title: FE-102 Integrate Authentication
Description: Description: Integrate Clerk or Supabase Auth in frontend with login and signup pages. Target: user authentication works and protected routes are enforced. Dependency: FE-101.

Title: FE-103 Create Base Layout Navigation
Description: Description: Implement main SaaS dashboard layout with sidebar and navigation routes for dashboard, practice, and history pages. Target: user can navigate between pages. Dependency: FE-101.

Title: BE-201 Create AI Service Module
Description: Description: Implement AI abstraction layer supporting Claude/GPT providers with functions ParseJobDescription, GenerateQuestions, AnalyzeAnswer. Target: API returns structured JSON responses. Dependency: BE-101.

Title: BE-202 Implement JD Parser Logic
Description: Description: Create prompt template and processing logic to extract skills, keywords, themes, and seniority from job descriptions. Target: structured job analysis JSON returned. Dependency: BE-201.

Title: BE-203 Create Job Parse Endpoint
Description: Description: Implement POST /job/parse endpoint that receives job description, calls AI parser, and stores parsed output. Target: parsed job description saved to database. Dependency: BE-202.

Title: FE-201 Build Job Description Input Page
Description: Description: Create UI where users paste job descriptions and submit to parser API. Target: API call works and loading state shown. Dependency: FE-101.

Title: FE-202 Display Parsed Job Insights
Description: Description: Display parsed skills, keywords, and seniority from AI response in structured UI cards. Target: parsed results rendered clearly. Dependency: FE-201.

Title: BE-301 Resume Storage API
Description: Description: Implement POST /resume endpoint to save resume text for each user. Target: resume stored successfully in database. Dependency: BE-102.

Title: BE-302 Implement Question Generation Logic
Description: Description: Implement AI prompt that generates 5 behavioral and 5 technical questions based on resume and job description. Target: AI returns structured question list. Dependency: BE-201.

Title: BE-303 Create Question Generation Endpoint
Description: Description: Implement POST /questions/generate endpoint that saves generated questions in database. Target: questions stored and returned via API. Dependency: BE-302.

Title: FE-301 Resume Input UI
Description: Description: Create UI form for users to paste resume text. Target: resume saved through backend API. Dependency: FE-101.

Title: FE-302 Practice Setup Screen
Description: Description: Create UI where users select job description and resume before generating questions. Target: questions generation triggered successfully. Dependency: FE-202.

Title: FE-303 Display Generated Questions
Description: Description: Display generated interview questions in preparation screen before starting session. Target: questions rendered correctly. Dependency: FE-302.

Title: BE-401 Create Practice Session Model
Description: Description: Implement session lifecycle model including states active, completed, abandoned. Target: sessions stored in database. Dependency: BE-103.

Title: BE-402 Session Start Endpoint
Description: Description: Implement POST /session/start endpoint to initialize interview session with generated questions. Target: session created successfully. Dependency: BE-401.

Title: BE-403 Answer Submission Endpoint
Description: Description: Implement POST /session/answer endpoint that stores user answers to interview questions. Target: answers saved successfully. Dependency: BE-401.

Title: FE-401 Interview Chat Interface
Description: Description: Build interview chat UI showing question and input field for answers. Target: user can answer questions interactively. Dependency: FE-303.

Title: FE-402 Question Navigation
Description: Description: Implement next and previous navigation for interview questions. Target: users can move between questions smoothly. Dependency: FE-401.

Title: BE-501 Answer Analysis AI Prompt
Description: Description: Implement AI prompt for analyzing answer quality and returning score, strengths, weaknesses, improvements, and STAR feedback. Target: structured feedback JSON returned. Dependency: BE-201.

Title: BE-502 Feedback Generation Endpoint
Description: Description: Implement POST /feedback/generate endpoint that stores AI feedback for answers. Target: feedback stored in database. Dependency: BE-501.

Title: BE-503 Score Aggregation Logic
Description: Description: Implement service calculating average session score and analytics metrics. Target: metrics stored for dashboard queries. Dependency: BE-502.

Title: FE-501 Feedback Display UI
Description: Description: Display AI feedback after each answer including score, strengths, and improvements. Target: feedback visible immediately after answer submission. Dependency: FE-401.

Title: FE-502 Session Summary Page
Description: Description: Create session summary page showing final score and improvement suggestions. Target: summary generated after session completion. Dependency: FE-501.

Title: BE-601 Session History Endpoint
Description: Description: Implement GET /session/history endpoint returning past interview sessions. Target: sessions listed correctly per user. Dependency: BE-401.

Title: BE-602 Progress Analytics Endpoint
Description: Description: Implement GET /progress endpoint returning average score, weak areas, and sessions completed. Target: analytics available for dashboard. Dependency: BE-503.

Title: BE-603 Deploy Backend Production
Description: Description: Deploy Go backend to Fly.io or Railway with Docker container and environment configuration. Target: API publicly accessible. Dependency: all backend tasks.

Title: FE-601 Session History UI
Description: Description: Create UI page listing past practice sessions with scores. Target: users can review previous interviews. Dependency: BE-601.

Title: FE-602 Progress Dashboard UI
Description: Description: Create analytics dashboard showing score trends and weak areas using charts. Target: dashboard reflects backend analytics. Dependency: BE-602.

Title: FE-603 Deploy Frontend Production
Description: Description: Deploy Next.js frontend to Vercel with environment variables and API configuration. Target: public production application accessible. Dependency: all frontend tasks.
